node.text: Dave went to a car show last Friday and enjoys checking out awesome cars and car mods.

node.text: Working on cars is like therapy for Dave and a way to get away from everyday stress. He sees it as more than a hobby, but a passion.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "car show attendance") on Session 22 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Dave got into engineering cars at a young age after being impressed by a car show with his dad.
Dave spent hours as a child tinkering with engines in his dad's garage, finding it to be like his sanctuary.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "car show attendance") on Session 22 (Score: 0.99)
